notes.polygon_note: AMK polygon is a simplified 9-point approximation of the Ang Mo Kio planning area boundary. It covers the general residential town area and does not precisely match the electoral GRC boundary (which includes parts of Hougang, Sengkang). For exact electoral boundaries, refer to the Elections Department Singapore.

address_corrections.Masjid Al-Muttaqin: The actual address is Block 5140 Ang Mo Kio Avenue 6 (not Avenue 1 as stated in request)
address_corrections.Ang Mo Kio Joint Temple: OneMap returns Block 722 at Avenue 8, not Avenue 6. The Joint Temple near Avenue 6 may be at a different block number.
